title: Seedcamp raises $320M for its new fund to expand its US footprint
slides: Seedcamp raised $320M for a new fund. But why now?
The firm has historically been a European-only investor.
Most of the capital will go to US-based startups instead.
European founders now face direct competition for its attention.
Check if Seedcamp is still an option for your geography.
thread_text:
1. Why now?

Seedcamp just raised $320M—but most of that cash is leaving Europe.

2. The shift

For 16 years, Seedcamp only backed European startups. Its new fund changes that.

3. US first

More than half the capital will go to American companies. European founders get less attention.

4. The squeeze

You now compete with US founders for Seedcamp’s time and money. Higher bar to stand out.

5. Your move

Check Seedcamp’s current portfolio by geography. If you're in Europe, ask: am I still on their radar?
video_script: But most of it leaves Europe.
European founders now compete with Americans.
Attention and money shift across the Atlantic.

script: But most of it leaves Europe.
European founders now compete with Americans.
Attention and money shift across the Atlantic.

instagram.caption:
Seedcamp just raised $320M, but over half of that new capital is earmarked for US startups, not European ones. 🇪🇺➡️🇺🇸

For 16 years, it only backed European founders. This new fund flips that strategy entirely. Most of the money—and attention—will now cross the Atlantic.

If you’re a European founder, you are now competing directly with US companies for Seedcamp’s time and cash. The bar just got higher for you to get noticed.

Is your geography working for or against you in their current portfolio?

carousel_slides.hook: Europe lost its fund, US wins.
carousel_slides.description: Seedcamp raised $320M, but most capital now targets American startups, shifting focus away from Europe.
For 16 years Seedcamp backed only European startups. The new fund breaks that tradition, prioritizing US companies.

carousel_slides.hook: More than half goes to US.
carousel_slides.description: Most of the $320M will fund American startups. European founders now compete harder for less attention.
European founders face direct competition from US startups for Seedcamp's time and capital. Bar is higher.
Check Seedcamp's current portfolio by geography. If European, verify you're still on their radar now.
